final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input ena,
    input clr,
    input [3:0] data,
    output reg [3:0] q);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (clr) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (load) begin
            q <= data;
        end else if (ena) begin
            q <= q << 1;  // Shift left by 1 bit
        end
    end

endmodule
